scope: Independent official-code adaptation for the VN30 panel; not an exact reproduction of Table 1 in the MAMBA-BGNN paper.

common_adapter.deterministic_uncertainty: One trainable homoscedastic log-variance scalar shared by all samples and stocks.
common_adapter.training_protocol: Shared VN30 loader, chronological split, train-only scaler, target, optimizer budget and validation selection.

frets.vn30_adaptation: A shared Linear(features,1) forms one signal per stock; stocks are FreTS channels; pred_len=1; output is one return per stock.
frets.official_defaults_kept: embed_size=128, hidden_size=256, sparsity_threshold=0.01, channel and temporal frequency learners.

stockmixer.license: No repository license found on 2026-06-22; architecture was independently reimplemented, not copied.
stockmixer.vn30_adaptation: Adds a batch dimension; stocks retain the upstream stock-mixing semantics; the stride-2 scale length is derived from lookback so lookback=20 is valid.
stockmixer.official_defaults_kept: TriU causal temporal projection, full/coarse temporal scales, indicator mixer, stock mixer hidden size 20, direct plus cross-stock readouts.

agcrn.vn30_adaptation: VN30 stocks are graph nodes and the 17 indicators are node features; horizon=1 and output_dim=1.
agcrn.official_defaults_kept: hidden_dim=64, num_layers=2, embed_dim=10, cheb_k=2, adaptive support and node-adaptive weight pools.

fouriergnn.vn30_adaptation: A shared Linear(features,1) forms one signal per stock; stocks are FourierGNN nodes; the upstream hard-coded cuda:0 move is removed.
fouriergnn.official_defaults_kept: embed_size=128, hidden_size=256, projection_width=8, three complex Fourier graph layers and soft shrinkage.

mambastock.license: No repository license found on 2026-06-22; architecture was independently reimplemented, not copied.
mambastock.vn30_adaptation: The same temporal model is shared over stocks and predicts from the final position of each lookback window; no stock graph is added.
mambastock.official_defaults_kept: hidden_dim=16, two Mamba layers, d_state=16, expand_factor=2, d_conv=4, RMSNorm and Tanh output.

lstm.vn30_adaptation: One shared two-layer LSTM is applied independently to each stock.

transformer.vn30_adaptation: One shared two-layer temporal Transformer is applied independently to each stock.
